```diff
-                 topRight: this.isFirstItem(index) ? $r('sys.float.corner_radius_level10') : 0,
-                 bottomLeft: this.isLastItem(index) ? $r('sys.float.corner_radius_level10') : 0,
-                 bottomRight:  this.isLastItem(index) ? $r('sys.float.corner_radius_level10') : 0,
-               })
-               .backgroundColor($r('sys.color.comp_background_list_card'))
-           }
+           CustomListItem({
+             item: item,
+             index: index,
+             isFirstItem: this.isFirstItem(index),
+             isLastItem: this.isLastItem(index),
+             totalCount: this.searchResultArray.totalCount(),
+             onAppItemClicked: this.onSearchItemClicked,
+             isSearchList: true,
+           })
          }, (item: AppInfo) => item.uid)
        }
      }
    }
  }
+
+@Reusable
+@Component
+struct CustomListItem {
+  @State item: AppInfo
+  @State index: number
+  @State isFirstItem: boolean
+  @State isLastItem: boolean
+  @State totalCount: number
+  @State onAppItemClicked: (index: number, item: AppInfo) => void
+  @State isSearchList: boolean
+
+  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+    this.item = params.item
+    this.index = params.index
+    this.isFirstItem = params.isFirstItem
+    this.isLastItem = params.isLastItem
+    this.totalCount = params.totalCount
+    this.onAppItemClicked = params.onAppItemClicked
+    this.isSearchList = params.isSearchList
+  }
+
+  build() {
+    ListItem() {
+      AppListItemComponent({
+        item: this.item,
+        index: this.index,
+        totalCount: this.totalCount,
+        onAppItemClicked: this.onAppItemClicked,
+        isSearchList: this.isSearchList,
+      })
+        .borderRadius({
+          topLeft: this.isFirstItem ? $r('sys.float.corner_radius_level10') : 0,
+          topRight: this.isFirstItem ? $r('sys.float.corner_radius_level10') : 0,
+          bottomLeft: this.isLastItem ? $r('sys.float.corner_radius_level10') : 0,
+          bottomRight: this.isLastItem ? $r('sys.float.corner_radius_level10') : 0,
+        })
+        .backgroundColor($r('sys.color.comp_background_list_card'))
+    }
+  }
+}
```
